description: Lock glass_mosaic_tesserae to glass pieces used in mosaic surfaces without requiring blown-glass workshops.

checks.reason: The batch preserves the broad Roman imperial century anchor.
Mosaic art remains the source-backed setting and design technique for tesserae.
Glassmaking remains the material-production context for glass tesserae.
Blown-glass workshops are adjacent Roman glass production infrastructure, not a necessary direct prerequisite for mosaic tesserae.
